utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What are you guys doing later ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , Rachel and I have appointments to get our hair cut .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Rachel and I have appointments to get our hair cut .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I want to see what he wants first .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I just found out that Elizabeth dad wants to meet me .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I just found out that Elizabeth dad wants to meet me .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Wait a minute , hold the phone ! You are not Elizabeth dad ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Come on guys , I ... I really want this guy to like me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It ... it would really help me out if you guys were here to make me look good .

utterances.speaker: All
utterances.text: Of course we will help ! Yeah ! We will be here !

emotion_cause.span: 9_It ... it would really help me out if you guys were here to make me look good .
10_Of course we will help ! Yeah ! We will be here !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We know how tough those parent/teacher conferences can be .
